Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SVETLANA RISHINA, Tel No. (510) 299-5346 appearing for Plaintiffs Mila Popov, the Mila Alemasov Revocable Trust Dated 9/10/99, and Sakiman, LLC;
Atty. PETER J. LINN of Bishop, Barry, Drath, APC, Tel No. (510) 596-0888 appearing for Defendant Fine By Design, Inc.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FINE BY DESIGN INC.'S Motion To Enforce Settlement is granted. Pursuant to CCP sec. 664.6, the parties entered into a binding, enforceable settlement. The August 14, 2014 hearing transcript establishes that Defendant agreed to pay Plaintiff $10,000 in exchange for a release of all claims. (Declaration of Peter Linn, Ex. A., Hearing Transcript, pp. 7:6-8:1.) Both parties stated on the record that they understood the terms of the settlement and agreed to them. (Id. at pp. 8:11-9:12.) Judge Sing concluded that the matter had been "resolved and settled." (Id. at p. 9: 13-14.) Thus, the terms agreed to on the record are binding and enforceable. Defendant's request for attorney's fees is denied. The parties did not agree to an attorney's fee provision on the record. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
